signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple USD (RLUSD) has officially launched across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volumes as of April 18, 2026[1]. This follows SEC legal battle resolution and XRP ETF approvals nearing completion, boosting institutional adoption[1].
